title: LinkML / CDISC mapping export
context: If structured-modeling consumers enter scope, delivered dictionaries should export to LinkML and CDISC mappings. This adds an export path from the canonical model, with versions pinned. Tooling only.
objective: Implement an export from the canonical dictionary model to LinkML and CDISC mappings with pinned versions and fixtures.
acceptanceCriteria: Exports the canonical model to valid LinkML and CDISC mapping artifacts, with the target spec versions pinned in specVersions.
Golden fixtures diffed in CI; outputs validated against the pinned specs.
Code MIT; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint green; DCO signed-off.
output: PR to the repo adding the LinkML/CDISC export plus golden fixtures.
